hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && { cd /Users/dustbunny/Documents/Meme/fab-stats && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; } || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; cd /Users/dustbunny/Documents/Meme/fab-stats && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
